chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2005 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability 26.05.2025 Mr. Ismail Shah, advocate for the petitioner. On the last date following order was passed: 2to5. Office has raised following objections: “1. How this Petition is maintainable in present form? 2. How the Petitioner is an aggrieved person and what is locus standi of Petitioner? 3. If Petitioner is not habitually filing the Petition, then Public interest demands the decision on merit and Petitioner is not required to withdraw or abandoned the same, as mentioned by S.M Zafar in his famous book “My Famous Cases.” 4. Why Separate Petition were not filed for Prayer (c) wherein different relief claimed i.e Cattle Mandi and Wednesday Bazar and Commercial Activity on Paly Ground? 5. Legible copy of Page No. 29 to be filed. 6. Certified copy of Order at page No. 31 to 37 to be filed.” Counsel is put on notice to address the office objections. To come up on 26.05.2025. Today learned counsel remained unable to satisfy on the account of maintainability. This petition found to be misconceived is dismissed in limine along with pending application/s. Judge Judge Amjad
